title: galium parisiense var. ruricola
intro: Galium parisiense var. ruricola, also known as the French bedstraw, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Galium parisiense var. ruricola include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate various health problems.
